content: Server-side PDF: install WeasyPrint + system deps; build pdf_gen.py (A4 invoice HTML) + GET /api/invoices/{id}/pdf endpoint
Frontend: 'Pobierz PDF' button (download blob) in invoice detail + list
Build deployment package: frontend prod build + backend + docker-compose (FastAPI+Mongo+Nginx) + Dockerfiles + .env.example + README (VPS cyberfolks)
